name: Super Surprise Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 large Potatoes (1 lb), pared and thinly sliced (3 cups)
2 medium Carrots, pared and thinly sliced (1 cup)
4 Thin shoulder pork chops, about 1 1/4 - 1 1/2 inches thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange potatoes, carrots, onions, and peas in a shallow 2-quart casserole dish large enough to hold pork chops in a single layer.
2. Brown the chops slowly on both sides in oil and margarine in a large skillet. Arrange over vegetables in a single layer.
3. Drain off all but 2 tablespoons of pan drippings from the skillet. Add flour, instant chicken broth, salt, and pepper; let bubble for 1 minute.
4. Gradually stir in water until the mixture thickens slightly. Pour over chops.
5. Cover tightly with aluminum foil.
6. Bake in an oven set to 350°F for 45 minutes. Remove foil and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes, or until the chops and vegetables are tender.
7. Remove from the oven; let stand for 10 minutes. Garnish with chopped parsley.
